IColumnSet Interface

One Identity Manager API Server

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public interface IColumnSet : ICollection<string>, 
	IEnumerable<string>, IEnumerable

The IColumnSet type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
AdditionalColumns
Returns a set of column names to be loaded from the database which will not be part of the client data model.
ReturnAllColumns
When this flag is set, all columns should be considered selected.
Top
Methods
  NameDescription
AddDynamicColumns
Registers a dynamic set of column names that will be evaluated on every request.
GetClientColumns
Returns the effective set of columns that are part of the client data model.
GetColumnsToLoad
Returns the effective set of columns to be loaded from the database.
ValidateAsync
Validates the column names in this collection and adds messages to the validation context if any errors occur.
Top

  NameDescription
